name: Blink Atomic Music
short_description: This is a game where you dodge bullet patterns generated from music using movement and Blink (short warp). Each song lasts about 2 minutes, and there are 9 songs in total.
detailed_description:
■ Dodge beats in a retro world! This game is an evasion-focused action title set in a nostalgic visual world reminiscent of early PCs, blending music and bullet hell. Use your reflexes to weave through countless bullet patterns generated to match diverse genres of music.

■ Stoic Action with Only "Movement" and "Blink" Players have only two actions: standard "Movement" and "Blink" for short-range teleportation. Even when faced with seemingly impenetrable walls of bullets filling the screen, you can find a way through by mastering Blink and timing your jumps perfectly. With no complex progression elements or systems, the game design lets you focus purely on "dodging every bullet."

■ Main Game Features

Bullet patterns synchronized with music: Patterns aren't fixed; they dynamically generate in sync with the song's progression and beats. Experience the thrill of becoming one with the music.

9 diverse stages: Each song lasts about 2 minutes. Features 9 AI-generated tracks spanning different genres. As the music changes, so does the bullet pattern's atmosphere and the way you dodge it.

Minimalist Art Style Inspired by Early PCs: Employs retro, simple graphics. The lack of unnecessary decoration ensures high bullet visibility, letting you immerse yourself in the gameplay.

Quick and Challenging Play: Each 2-minute stage packs a concentrated dose of intense bullet-dodging fun.
